nodes.name: 鸻科
nodes.summary: 鸻科（Charadriidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联54种鸟类，如灰斑鸻、Tawny-throated dotterel、Pied plover等54种鸟类。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: 鸻形目
nodes.summary: 鸻形目（Charadriiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联310种鸟类，如勺嘴鹬、短腿鸻、白鞘嘴鸥等310种鸟类。

nodes.name: 查塔姆群岛
nodes.summary: 查塔姆群岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联6种鸟类，包括Spotless crake、Double-banded plover、Grey-backed storm petrel等6种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 湿地
nodes.summary: 浅水、沼泽与植被斑块组成的高生产力生态系统。

nodes.name: 河口
nodes.summary: 淡水与海水交汇形成的高生产力边缘生态系统。

nodes.name: Double-banded plover
nodes.summary: Double-banded plover（Double-banded plover，学名 Anarhynchus bicinctus），分类上属于鸻形目，并归入鸻科，在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，主要分布于查塔姆群岛、奥克兰群岛，常见栖息地包括海岸湿地、河口、湿地。

nodes.name: 海岸湿地
nodes.summary: 海湾、泻湖、盐沼与河口组成的复合湿地。

nodes.name: 奥克兰群岛
nodes.summary: 奥克兰群岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Double-banded plover、Antarctic prion、Yellow-crowned parakeet，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Two subspecies are recognised: the nominate Charadrius bicinctus bicinctus, which breeds throughout New Zealand, including the Chatham Islands, and Charadrius bicinctus exilis, which breeds in New Zealand's subantarctic Auckland Islands

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Two subspecies are recognised: the nominate Charadrius bicinctus bicinctus, which breeds throughout New Zealand, including the Chatham Islands, and Charadrius bicinctus exilis, which breeds in New Zealand's subantarctic Auckland Islands

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Many others breed on shingle riverbeds in Hawke's Bay, the Manawatū Plains and the Wairarapa in the North Island. Some nest on sandy coasts, especially near the mouths of streams or rivers in the North and South islands. Small numbers breed in higher altitude areas such as Tongariro National Park and subalpine areas of Central Otago. In the summer months of December to March the birds disperse somewhat from their breeding grounds, with many that nest in inland locations moving to estuaries and other coastal wetlands
